meta.title: How America lost a secret STEALTH helicopter
meta.description:
After delving into the technology and design lineage of America's secret fleet of stealth Black Hawk helicopters last week, it's now time to explore the operational history of these exotic rotorcraft. 

What exactly happened in Operation Neptune Spear? And what came next for these highly classified helicopters?

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
